_comment_about_this_file: Drop this into your Claude Desktop config under the `mcpServers`
key. The path Claude Desktop reads varies by platform — on macOS
Replace REPLACE_ME placeholders with your deployment's values:
* MCP_URL       — the public URL of your POST /mcp/ endpoint
* SESSION_VALUE — the value of the Django `sessionid` cookie
* CSRF_VALUE    — the value of the Django `csrftoken` cookie
(and pass it back as the X-CSRFToken header)
Claude Desktop currently supports stdio transport; this file shows
the typical shape for a server that exposes an HTTP MCP endpoint.
If your Claude Desktop build supports HTTP transport natively, use
the HTTP block. Otherwise wrap the server with mcp-proxy (or an
equivalent) so stdio frames are translated to HTTP for you.
